code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD harmony_of_blows[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] click harmony_of_blows callback " Harmony of Blows

Cost: 8 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Extra Action
Minimum Melee: 2
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

The patterns and flows of a battlefield hold no mysteries for the character. She does not need to improvise last-second defenses. She notices openings well before they appear. She can choose her blows precisely, selecting multiple actions that combine harmoniously. In the turn in which she invokes this Charm, the character can take two extra attack actions, using Archery, Brawl, Melee or Thrown. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm.
This Charm is explicitly permitted to be in a Combo with Charms of other Abilities. Note that the rules on Combos may limit the kinds of actions a character can take. " meditation_on_war[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] harmony_of_blows --> meditation_on_war click meditation_on_war callback " Meditation on War

Cost: 1 mote per die + 1 mote per dice pool penalty cancelled
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows

Calm and precision envelops the character as she strikes. She adds dice to one Melee attack, increasing it to a maximum of its normal pool plus the character's Essence. For example, an Essence 3 character who has a - 1 wound penalty can spend up to 4 motes to enhance her attack. This can overcome penalties that reduce the character's dice pool to 0 before Charms. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm. " orchestration_of_conflict[IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] harmony_of_blows --> orchestration_of_conflict click orchestration_of_conflict callback " Orchestration of Conflict

Cost: 2 motes per target number reduction
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows

Manipulating the local flow of a conflict through the ripple effects of her own actions, the character reduces the target number for a Melee attack or parry. " impeding_the_flow[IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] click impeding_the_flow callback " Impeding the Flow

Cost: 3 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Melee: 2
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

A wind full of red stardust and the character's will, visible to those who can see dematerialized spirits, spins around the character. It reroutes the flows of Essence and fate that normally allow others to attack her. A casual movement of the Exalt's weapon parries any one incoming attack she is aware of, so long as the attack has a physical component and is not specifically noted as impossible to block. This is not a perfect defense. " serenity_in_blood[IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] harmony_of_blows --> serenity_in_blood impeding_the_flow --> serenity_in_blood click serenity_in_blood callback " Serenity in Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Melee: 4
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows, Impeding the Flow

Stirring the currents of fate with the tip of her weapon, the character disrupts the path of any attack made against her, so long as it passes through any portion of the world bound by fate. If she is unaware of the attack, her player must make a reflexive Perception + Melee roll at difficulty 3 to divert the blow. Otherwise, this is a perfect block, capable of stopping even unblockable attacks. " smiling_at_the_damned[IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] click smiling_at_the_damned callback " Smiling at the Damned

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 4
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: None

In the moment the character's weapon strikes true, the colors around her take on a harsh red tinge. Essence dissolves at the weapon's touch. Halve the raw damage for one attack, rounding down, but the damage is aggravated. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Conviction with this Charm. " perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] meditation_on_war --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior orchestration_of_conflict --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior serenity_in_blood --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior smiling_at_the_damned --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior click perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior callback " Perfection of the Visionary Warrior

Cost: 10 motes, 1 Willpower, 1 health level
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Melee: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Meditation on War, Orchestration of Conflict, Serenity in Blood, Smiling at the Damned

This Charm uses a prayer strip marked with the scripture of the Maiden on the Shelf. The character places it across his eyes, whereupon it adheres and begins to drip with dark blood. The character suffers no visibility penalties. All opponents and attacks become apparent to him, although effects such as the Mental Invisibility Technique can force him to ignore them. He sees enemies not as bodies and faces but as patterns of fate and potential or — for creatures outside of fate — disruptions in such patterns. The character can reflexively parry any blockable attack with his full Dexterity + Melee dice pool. Once per turn, after his initiative, he can reflexively make an Archery, Brawl, Melee or Thrown attack at his full dice pool. He cannot use the latter ability in any turn where he splits his normal dice pool. "
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为这套工业物联网的近战Charm系统画一个清晰的依赖关系图。核心节点是Harmony of Blows，它是整个体系的起点，没有前置Charm要求，可以让角色在一回合内获得两次额外的攻击动作。
明白了，Harmony of Blows作为根节点。我注意到它有三个直接后继——Meditation on War、Orchestration of Conflict和Serenity in Blood，对吗？
对的，但要注意Serenity in Blood比较特殊，它需要两个前置：Harmony of Blows和Impeding the Flow。后者是另一个独立的分支起点。
好的，我已经把Impeding the Flow作为独立入口添加进去了，它本身没有前置要求，可以反射性地格挡一次有物理成分的攻击。现在Serenity in Blood有两个入边。
顶层还有一个Smiling at the Damned，也是无前置的，它让攻击伤害变为恶性。这四个节点——Meditation on War、Orchestration of Conflict、Serenity in Blood、Smiling at the Damned——共同汇聚到一个终极Charm。
汇聚到Perfection of the Visionary Warrior？这个Charm要求同时满足四个前置条件，成本也很高——10 motes、1点意志力还要消耗1点健康等级。
没错，这是整个体系的顶点。它让角色在整个场景内无视 visibility 惩罚，能自动感知所有对手，即使面对Mental Invisibility Technique也能识别，除非被强制忽略。
结构已经画好了。我注意到Harmony of Blows有个细节——它明确允许与其他能力的Charm组成Combo，这在规则上很特别。
是的，Sidereal Exalted使用这些Charm时都可以配合Temperance或Conviction。另外Meditation on War的机制是消耗motes来增加骰子，最多到正常池加上Essence值，还能抵消惩罚。
关于节点标签，我打算用技术化的命名方式映射——Harmony of Blows对应IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，Meditation on War对应ActuatorController，这样符合工业场景。其他几个怎么映射？
Orchestration of Conflict用TelemetryStream，Impeding the Flow和Serenity in Blood都用MQTT_Broker——等等，这两个用同一个技术标签？让我再确认一下。
我检查了一下，Serenity in Blood确实应该映射到MQTT_Broker，和Impeding the Flow相同。但Smiling at the Damned也是TelemetryStream，这样Orchestration of Conflict和Smiling at the Damned共享同一个技术标签，需要区分吗？

不需要区分，这种映射是允许的。最终Perfection of the Visionary Warrior映射到ActuatorController，和Meditation on War一样。现在检查所有连接关系：Harmony of Blows出边到Meditation on War、Orchestration of Conflict、Serenity in Blood；Impeding the Flow出边到Serenity in Blood；然后四个节点都指向Perfection of the Visionary Warrior。
连接确认无误。我为每个节点添加了详细的callback信息，包括Cost、Duration、Type、Minimum Melee、Minimum Essence、Prerequisite Charms和完整的效果描述。
Perfection of the Visionary Warrior的描述里要特别强调——角色看到的不是敌人的肉体，而是fate and potential的模式，对命运之外的生物则看到模式中的扰动。这是关键设定。
已包含。另外它的自动攻击能力每回合限一次，且不能与分池动作同回合使用，这些限制条件也都写进去了。整个图使用dark主题。
很好，这个结构完整呈现了从基础Extra Action到终极Simple Charm的进阶路径，两个独立入口的设计也体现了不同的战斗风格选择。可以定稿了。
